name: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.

legal_basis.note: Lawful object — governing law must be India for Indian parties

title: Governing Law

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Seat of arbitration determines supervisory court jurisdiction under A&C Act S.42

dispute_hotspots: Conflict between exclusive jurisdiction clause and arbitration clause
Foreign law chosen — Indian courts may refuse to apply
